name: Hates the Moon
rules: Shoot arrows at the moon whenever visible

name: Terrified of Chickens
rules: Run away from any chicken on sight
Refuse to eat chicken based food

name: Thinks Creepers are Friendly
rules: Never attack a creeper, even in self defense

name: Cannot Walk Past Treasure
rules: Stop to open every chest you see
Dig toward any visible ore immediately

name: Believes Dirt is Valuable
rules: Try to trade dirt for other items

name: Afraid of Water
rules: Refuse to swim unless absolutely necessary
Build bridges instead of crossing water

name: Obsessed with Cows
rules: Refuse to let anyone harm a cow

name: Convinced They Are Royalty
rules: Demand others bow before entering your base
